Comfortable Accommodation: Kotor Kelly Apartments in Kotor offers a 3-star apartment with a sun terrace, garden, and free WiFi. Guests enjoy air-conditioning, a terrace, kitchenette, and private bathroom.
Convenient Facilities: The property features a 24-hour front desk, laundry service, barbecue facilities, and a tour desk. Free on-site private parking is available.
Prime Location: Located 6 km from Tivat Airport, the apartment is a 5-minute walk from Kotor Beach and less than 1 km from Sea Gate. Nearby attractions include Kotor Clock Tower and Saint Sava Church.
Guest Highlights: Guests appreciate the friendly host, convenient location, and beautiful garden.

Essential Facilities: Antonella in Kotor offers a terrace and free WiFi. Guests can enjoy sea views and a balcony, complemented by air-conditioning and a private bathroom.
Comfortable Living: The apartment features a living room with a sofa bed, dining table, and TV. A fully equipped kitchen includes a refrigerator, microwave, oven, and stovetop. Additional amenities include a washing machine, hairdryer, and tiled floors.

Historic Charm: Three Dots by Todorovic Family in Kotor offers a villa housed in a historic building. Guests enjoy a private beachfront, water sports facilities, and a lush garden.
Modern Amenities: The property features a terrace, free WiFi, and a balcony with stunning views. Additional facilities include a minimarket, outdoor seating area, and free on-site parking.
Comfortable Accommodation: The villa offers two bedrooms and two bathrooms, a fully equipped kitchen, and a comfortable living room. Air-conditioning, a fireplace, and a washing machine ensure a pleasant stay.
Prime Location: Located 11 km from Tivat Airport, Three Dots by Todorovic Family is a short walk from Virtu Beach.
